title: Heroes of SoulCraft
description:
What kind of game is Heroes of SoulCraft?An upcoming free-to-play MOBA that combines traditional lane-based gameplay and intense team battles with innovative mechanics, maintaining the classic feel of the genre while introducing new elements that add depth, strategy, and excitement to every match. Easy to learn, difficult to master. 

What makes Heroes of SoulCraft different from other MOBAs?Ever wanted to wield the powers of mythical creatures like a raging fire dragon or a towering rock golem? Titans are powerful battlefield forces that reshape fights, giving you distinct ways to pressure enemies and control the flow of the match. Your titan choice works alongside your hero and items to define your strategy and create advantages your opponents must adapt to or be overwhelmed by.

There’s far more to master than any list can cover. Discover the game’s features, mechanics, and systems for yourself by exploring, experimenting, and theory-crafting. Use the Discord forums to post your feedback, suggestions, and guides.

Where can I download Heroes of SoulCraft?Download will be available on Steam at launch. The game is currently in development, with closed playtesting coming soon. Updates and announcements will be shared on Discord as development progresses. No ETA is currently scheduled.
description_short: An upcoming free-to-play MOBA that combines traditional lane-based gameplay and intense team battles with innovative mechanics, maintaining the classic feel of the genre while introducing new elements that add depth, strategy, and excitement to every match. Easy to learn, difficult to master.
